policy.note: This check validates the HTTP runner report only. It does not execute local models or read worker output contents.

findings.message: Runner status must be dry-run ready or executed review-only.
Runner must stay review-only.
Runner must not read private_context_paths.
Runner must not read private source paths.
Runner must not write Git.
Runner must not write cloud.
Runner must keep public-ready at 0.
Runner task id must be present.
Runner output must stay under KosmoZentrale worker_packets.
Runner output filename must be private.
Runner guard must pass.
Runner guard failures must be zero.
Runner must enumerate safe input reports.
Safe input must stay under data/, docs/ or examples/: data/kosmoasset-source-candidate-map-2026-06-15.json
Safe input should not be truncated for the default smoke task: data/kosmoasset-source-candidate-map-2026-06-15.json
Safe input must stay under data/, docs/ or examples/: docs/codex/kosmoasset-source-candidate-map-2026-06-15.md
Safe input should not be truncated for the default smoke task: docs/codex/kosmoasset-source-candidate-map-2026-06-15.md
Safe input must stay under data/, docs/ or examples/: data/kosmo-source-root-selection-brief-2026-06-15.json
Safe input should not be truncated for the default smoke task: data/kosmo-source-root-selection-brief-2026-06-15.json
Safe input must stay under data/, docs/ or examples/: docs/codex/kosmo-source-root-selection-brief-2026-06-15.md
Safe input should not be truncated for the default smoke task: docs/codex/kosmo-source-root-selection-brief-2026-06-15.md
Safe input must stay under data/, docs/ or examples/: data/kosmo-data-lane-command-router-2026-06-15.json
Safe input should not be truncated for the default smoke task: data/kosmo-data-lane-command-router-2026-06-15.json
Safe input must stay under data/, docs/ or examples/: data/kosmo-worker-boundary-pack-check-2026-06-15.json
Safe input should not be truncated for the default smoke task: data/kosmo-worker-boundary-pack-check-2026-06-15.json
Runner must not use a model unless execute is requested.
Dry-run runner must not start a model.

next_actions: Treat the HTTP runner as safe for review-only dry-run visibility.
Use --execute only after an overseer deliberately requests a local model task run.
Rerun this check after any runner report, task-pack or output-path change.
